title: Teneo’s Kevin Kajiwara Discusses Tariffs and Iran on Bloomberg’s The Close
snippet: Kevin Kajiwara, Global Chair, Political Risk Advisory, joins Bloomberg’s The Close to discuss the effects of SCOTUS’ recent tariff ruling, along with the latest concerns coming out of Iran.

title: Teneo’s Gabriel Wildau Discusses China’s Likely Response to Latest U.S. Tariffs with CNBC
